=== RUN   Test_MyNoopTestSuite
--- PASS: Test_MyNoopTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   Test_MyNoopParallelTestSuite
=== PAUSE Test_MyNoopParallelTestSuite
=== RUN   Test_MyTestSuite
=== RUN   Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific
=== RUN   Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
=== PAUSE Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
=== CONT  Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
--- PASS: Test_MyTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: Test_MyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestMyNoopTestSuite
--- PASS: TestMyNoopTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific
--- PASS: TestMyTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   Test_my_X_MySkippedTestSuite
    ƒƒ_suite_test.go:179: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: Test_my_X_MySkippedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestX_MySkippedTestSuite
    ƒƒ_suite_test.go:183: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestX_MySkippedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== CONT  Test_MyNoopParallelTestSuite
--- PASS: Test_MyNoopParallelTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
PASS
ok  	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/my	<TIMESTAMP>
